name: broadcastr
description: Real-time activity broadcast across concurrent Claude Code sessions. Captures commits, plan edits, bash commands into a shared JSONL bus; each session sees what others are doing.

apprise_enabled.description: Fan out alert-tier events to apprise

global_feed.description: Tail the global bus in addition to the per-repo bus

mute_categories.description: Categories to drop from the agent feed

bus_max_bytes.description: Rotate the bus when it exceeds this size

bus_retain.description: Number of rotated bus files to keep
